When we drop a nuke on an enemy province.
$TITLE$, we can report we have successfully dropped a nuclear bomb on $PROV$. This has destroyed most of the industry and killed many people.
The national unity of $TARGET$ has dropped by $IMPACT$.
We nuked $PROV$, reducing $TARGET$'s national unity by $IMPACT$.
When someone drops a nuke on one of our provinces.
$TITLE$, we are shocked to report that $EVIL$ have dropped a nuclear bomb on $PROV$. This has destroyed most of the industry and killed many people.
Our national unity has dropped by $IMPACT$.
$EVIL$ nuked $PROV$, reducing our national unity by $IMPACT$.

When we liberate a country and restore their government.
$TITLE$, we can report that our liberation of $FREE$ has been a major success. Today a parade of troops has marched through $FCAPITAL$ in a joyous celebration.
We liberated $FREE$, and restored their government to $FCAPITAL$.
When our government has been restored by our allies.

$TITLE$, we can report that $FCAPITAL$ has been liberated, and our government has officially returned. The city is filled with celebrators, cheering for this great day. We are eternally grateful to $FROM$ for saving our country.
Our government was restored to $FCAPITAL$, thanks to the help from $FROM$.
When another country gets their government restored.
$TITLE$, we can report that $FREE$ has been liberated by $FROM$. Their government has been restored to $FCAPITAL$ and they are no longer in exile.
$FREE$ has been liberated, and their government restored to $FCAPITAL$.
